Used in variant Global (only appears on desktop) Example: [ {id: "AFG", color: "value01"}, {id: "AGO", color: "default"}, {id: "ALB", color: "value05"} ]

properties.name: dataForColor
properties.description: Data needed to color the world map. Valid values: array with country id and numeric data. It can have additional data. Country id to be obtained from the GeoJSON data. Used always with the conditionsForColor property. Used in variant Global (only appears on desktop) Example: [ { id: "USA", ranking: 1, name: "United States", gdp: 25462700 }, { id: "CHN", ranking: 2, name: "China", gdp: 17963171 }, { id: "JPN", ranking: 3, name: "Japan", gdp: 4231141 }, ]

properties.name: conditionsForColor
properties.description: Conditions to color the world map. Valid values: array with color and conditions. Data to be obtained from dataForColor property. If country doesn't comply with any condition, the color of the country will depend on the ambient. Used in variant Global (only appears on desktop) Example: [ { color: "value01", property: "gdp", min: 500000, max: "" }, { color: "default", property: "gdp", min: 100000, max: 500000 }, { color: "value05", property: "gdp", min: 10000, max: 100000 }, { color: "value06", property: "gdp", min: 0, max: 10000 }, ]

description: A date range allows a user to make a selection of a range of dates. Once tapped it will open either the native device date picker or a modal.

properties.description: Layer with error icon and error message

properties.description: Date for range start; formatted as 'YYYY/MM/DD'

properties.description: Date for range end; formatted as 'YYYY/MM/DD'

properties.description: indicates if the min or max dates are from interval case

properties.description: Optional label when the form select it not required

description: The form input is used to create interactive controls to receive data from the user. A variety of input data types and control widgets are available, depending on the device and user agent: amount, camera, contact, date, number, password, predictive, search, text, text-area or time.

properties.name: cardStatus
properties.description: bbva-clip-card status overlay to show. Allowed status card are 'blocked', 'off' and 'pending'

properties.name: cardType
properties.description: Card type logo to use, Allowed current types are 'visa' (default) and 'mastercard'

properties.name: cardImage
properties.description: Property to set a card image

properties.name: partner
properties.description: If true, partner state will be used and slot text will be shown

properties.name: preventFocusAfterReset
properties.description: Prevents focus after clearing the input when resetValue is set to true

properties.name: cardVariant
properties.description: Card variant to use as background. Allowed variants are 'default' (default), 'debit', 'credit', 'prepay', 'camino' and 'gold'

properties.name: abbreviations
properties.default: { 1: 'da', 2: 'h', 3: 'k', 6: 'M', // Million 9: 'B', // Normalized is actually 'G', but this is more understandable }
properties.description: Chars used as abbreviature depending on the applied scale. Values got from (http://www.statman.info/conversions/number_scales.html)

properties.name: actionSecondaryAccessibleText
properties.description: Accessible text for secondary action button

properties.name: allowedPattern
properties.description: Regex-like list of characters allowed as input; all characters not in the list will be rejected. The recommended format should be a list of allowed characters, for example, `[a-zA-Z0-9.+!;:-]`. This pattern represents the allowed characters for the field; as the user inputs text, each individual character will be checked against the pattern (rather than checking the entire value as a whole). If a character is not a match, it will be rejected. Pasted input will have each character checked individually; if any character doesn't match `allowedPattern`, the entire pasted string will be rejected.

properties.name: autoselect
properties.description: If true, first option will be automatically selected when results are shown

properties.name: autoValidate
properties.description: Set to true to auto-validate the input value as you type.

properties.name: decimalsHidden
properties.description: If true, decimal part of the amount will be hidden regardless of its value.

properties.name: filterValueKey
properties.description: Item key used to fill value when option is selected. If not defined, the item will be used as value

properties.name: hintsListLabel
properties.description: Accessible label for list of hints

properties.name: keepOnBlur
properties.description: If true, results won't be hidden on blur

properties.name: keepOnSelect
properties.description: If true, results won't be hidden when an option is selected

properties.name: labelOut
properties.description: Label out variation with label sitting above the select

properties.name: localCurrency
properties.description: ISO 4217 for the local currency. A value must be provided in order to localice the currency symbols.

properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: Maximum number of results to show. Set it to null

properties.name: minChars
properties.description: Minimum number of chars to activate search

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of input related to forms

properties.name: overlay
properties.description: If true, results will receive position absolute and won't push the content below the component

properties.name: preventValueUpdateOnSelect
properties.description: If true, input value won't be updated on option select

properties.name: search
properties.description: If true, search input will be used

properties.name: selectOnBlur

properties.description: If true, decimal part of the amount will be hidden if there is a trailing zero.

properties.name: visible
properties.description: If true, password is currently visible

properties.name: zeroDecimalsHidden
properties.description: If true, decimal part of the amount will be hidden if is zero.

properties.name: modeInput
properties.description: Allows a browser to display an appropiate virtual keyboard. Values: 'none', 'text', 'decimal', 'numeric', 'tel', 'search', 'email', 'url'

properties.description: Size for field height: options are S or M

properties.description: If true, action button/icon is internal. It's DOM is bbva-form-field's son. Else, only an input will be painted and it's DOM could be bva-form-field's brother. It's default value is 'false' to achieve retrocompatibility. In the future, this property could be deleted.

properties.name: validateOnBlur

properties.name: helpIcon

properties.name: symbol

properties.name: language
properties.description: Language for thousand group separator and decimal separator

properties.name: abbr
properties.description: Abbr used to display the given amount. Allowed values are 1, 2, 3, 6 and 9. Values got from (http://www.statman.info/conversions/number_scales.html) Note: 9 is abbreviated as 'B' (Billions) instead of 'G'.

description: A help tooltip provides valuable information to the user about features within the application.

properties.name: headerTitleSize
properties.description: Header title size, can be L (20px) or XL (24px)

properties.name: verticalPlacement
properties.description: `String` defining vertical placement of tooltip. Can be 'top' or 'bottom'

properties.name: horizontalPlacement
properties.description: `String` defining horizontal placement of tooltip (arrow). Can be 'right' 'center' or 'left'

properties.name: centerPositionTooltip
properties.description: `Boolean` center position for icons or paragraph

properties.name: contextual
properties.description: `Boolean` allows you to add design styles from desktop mode onwards.

properties.name: avoidClickable
properties.description: To control when the invoker is not clickable

properties.name: headerTitleTag
properties.description: Header title tag, can be h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6

properties.name: autoScrollTime
properties.description: change the time it takes for autoscroll, need auto-scroll-active

properties.name: activeObserverScrollTooltipOverlay
properties.description: Changes tooltip overlay to transparent while outside the viewport

properties.name: autoScrollPosition
properties.description: Target point where the autoscroll will stop, need auto-scroll-active

properties.name: autoScrollGetBoundingDetail
properties.description: Choose the autoscroll focus point, need auto-scroll-active

properties.name: autoScrollExtraBoundingDetailPosition
properties.description: Add or subtract to the autoscroll focus point, need auto-scroll-active

properties.name: avoidOpenedFocusIn
properties.description: To control openend when is focus in

properties.name: avoidOpenedMouseOver
properties.description: To control openend when is mouse over

properties.name: headingEllipsis
properties.description: If true, the heading will show ellipsis when text is too long. If false, the heading will wrap to multiple lines.

properties.name: accessibilityContextualization
properties.description: Contextualizing accessibility for a more understandable description

properties.name: heading
properties.description: `String` to use as text for the header

properties.name: description
properties.description: `String` to use as text for the subheader

properties.name: stepsText
properties.description: `String` to use as text for the steps

properties.name: linkAccessibilityContextualization
properties.description: Contextualizing accessibility for a more understandable link description

properties.name: linkText
properties.description: `String` to use as text for the link. If link text is set, date property is ignored

properties.name: linkHref
properties.description: `String` that represents a url to use for the link. If not included the link will act as a button instead

properties.name: linkTarget
properties.description: `String` that represents the link target if linkHref is provided

properties.name: opened
properties.description: `Boolean` that will dictate whether the tooltip is hidden or not

description: Swipe Actions are a list of contextual operative or informative actions that appear when a user swipes left or right on a list item. There are two different kinds of swipe actions: informative and operational. They are composed the same elements each having a different background color to differentiate between the two.

properties.description: Property to trigger swipe action when actions are promises

properties.name: operativeActions
properties.description: Array of operative actions to show. Each action should be an object with 'icon' and 'label'

properties.name: informativeActions
properties.description: Array of informative actions to show. Each action should be an object with 'icon' and 'label'

properties.name: threshold
properties.description: Percentage of actions block to be tracked over to trigger a state change

properties.name: operativeWarning
properties.description: If true, the operative actions sections change to warning state

properties.name: animate
properties.description: Can't be used together with the attribute `opening`

properties.name: opening
properties.description: Current opening direction of invoker. Possible values are 'right' or 'left'

events.description: Emitted when swipe animation ends. (Propio)

events.description: Emitted when an action in swipe is clicked. Detail: `{ item, index, type }` ; Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio)

events.name: list-swipe-track-left
events.description: Emitted when a left-track swipe is detected. Detail: `{ element }` ; Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio)

events.name: list-swipe-track-right
events.description: Emitted when a right-track swipe is detected. Detail: `{ element }` ; Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio)

description: Component that organize content across different views by tabs

properties.name: options
properties.description: List of options. Each option can have the following attributes: - title: The title of the tab. - panelId: The id of the panel associated to a tab. If It is not informed, the id is content-<index of tab> by default. - icon: The icon of the tab. - badgeAccessible. The text associated to the badge for the accessibility of the badge. - text. A complementary text for the tab. - badgeDot. Show notification as dot. Available values: right, left. - badgeText. The text to show in the badge.

properties.name: tabsPerPage
properties.description: Maximum number of visible tabs without scroll.

properties.name: tabsPerPageTablet
properties.description: Maximum number of visible tabs in tablet without scroll.

properties.name: tabsPerPageDesktop
properties.description: Maximum number of visible tabs in desktop without scroll.

properties.name: sticky
properties.description: Flag to add the behavior of position sticky for the tabs with origin in the document

properties.name: rootMargin
properties.description: If sticky property is true, set pixels from the top edge of the document to apply position sticky

properties.name: hasEllipsis
properties.description: Apply ellipsis for button group item

properties.name: stickyBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color to apply when the tabs are in position sticky

properties.name: fullHeight
properties.description: If true, content will use 100% height

properties.name: variant
properties.description: Variant Allowed variants are navigation and icon

properties.name: isAnimateTabs
properties.description: Enable or disable the option for the hide tabs animation

properties.name: scrollElement
properties.description: Element that will be affected by auto scroll

properties.name: notFocusablePanel
properties.description: If true, the panel will not be focusable to accessibility tools

properties.name: overlaid
properties.description: If true, the tab component does not attach the inline transformation that moves the content when a tab is selected, EFFECTIVELY BREAKING THE TAB FUNCTIONALITY. Set to true when you need a tooltip that sits in the content of a tab, and you need the overlay to cover the whole page.

events.name: tab-default-sticky-behavior-change
events.description: Emitted when sticky behavior changes. Detail: `{ sticky }` ; Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio)

events.name: tab-default-tab-change
events.description: Emitted when the active tab changes. Detail: `{ selected }` ; Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio)

events.name: tab-default-tab-click
events.description: Emitted when a tab is clicked. Detail: `{ index }` ; Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio)

properties.description: Text size Values: 'XS', 'S', 'M', 'L', 'XL', '2XL', '3XL', '4XL', '5XL', '6XL', '7XL' Not all sizes are available for all fontTypes fontType 'legal': 'S', default 'S' fontType 'body': 'XS', 'S', 'M', 'L', default 'M' fontType 'title-default': 'M', 'L', 'XL', '2XL', '3XL', default 'M' fontType 'title-secondary': 'XL', '2XL', '3XL', '4XL', '5XL', '6XL', '7XL', default 'XL'

properties.name: enableInteractivity
properties.description: Flag to control interactivity when required

properties.name: allowedTags
properties.description: Set allowed HTML tags for the text content Default tags: 'span','strong','em','b','i','u','br','mark','small','sub','sup','abbr',

properties.name: titleText
properties.description: Provides a title attribute. Intended in this component to be used mainly in tag 'abbr' but title can be added to any HTML tag.

properties.name: tag
properties.description: HTML tag to give semantic meaning to the text Examples: 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'p', 'span',

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight style Values: '350', '500', only available for fontType 'body'

properties.name: lines
properties.description: Number of lines to truncate the text. This property only works if ellipsis property is true.

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Default time in millis a notification is shown if no duration is provided

properties.name: notificationIcons
properties.default: { info: sphericaInfo(), warning: sphericaInfo(), error: sphericaWarning(), success: sphericaRight(), }

usage_examples: npm install @bbva-spherica-components/bbva-widget-configuration-mixin
Emitting a `show-notification-event` also can activate a notification. the detail object must be of the form the `add()` function takes.
Set `fixed-bottom` attribute to show the notification fixed at bottom of the page

#### Styling The following custom properties are available for styling: ##### Custom properties | Selector | CSS Property | CSS Variable | Theme Variable | Foundations/Fallback | | -------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------- | -------------- | -------------------- | | :host | z-index | --bbva-notification-container-z-index | | 8 | > Styling documentation generated by Cells CLI bbva-notification-container ### Properties - **ariaLiveText**: string = "polite" (attribute: aria-live-text) Aria live of the notification container - **defaultType**: string = "error" (attribute: default-type) Notification default type that's shown when no type is provided. - **duration**: number = 4000 (attribute: duration) Default time in millis a notification is shown if no duration is provided - **fixedBottom**: boolean (attribute: fixed-bottom) Set to true to position the notification fixed at bottom - **notificationIcons**: object = { info: sphericaInfo(), warning: sphericaInfo(), error: sphericaWarning(), success: sphericaRight(), } (attribute: notificationIcons) Object that contains icon names for the different types of notifications. - **roleText**: string = "alert" (attribute: role-text) Role of the notification container ### Events - **show-notification** Fired when show-notification event is dispatched on document. Detail: { type: string, duration: string, description: string }. Bubbles: true; Composed: true. (Propio) ### Methods - **add** Adds a notification to the stack and displays it. - **{ description = '', simpleLinkText, type = this.defaultType, duration = this.duration, }** - **options**: number Configuration options or settings.duration Duration on screen. Set to zero to not hide - **clear** Hides the current visible notification. - **all**: boolean if true empty the notification´s stack - **getParentElement** ### CSS Custom Properties - **--bbva-notification-container-z-index** = 8 ## index.js (JS) ### Variables - **BbvaWidgetConfigurationMixin** `BbvaWidgetConfigurationMixin` include a functionality to configure the basic widget properties. Property config: Editables options of config: - header - loader - notify You can set them to `true` if you want to use them, or set an object with the properties as keys and their values to customize each widget. When you use the header component, you can include, such as rightIconSecondary, the smart assistant or the faqs icon. You must set the smartAssistant or faqs properties to true respectively in the config object. Usage: Add the mixin to class (In extends)
